Aylık ne kadar?: How much is it per month?
Ayrılan müşteri kaybolmaz: A customer who walks away isn't lost for good
Beğen, okut, üstünde gör: Like it, scan it, see it on you
Butik sahibi panelden QR etiketlerini yö: Boutique owners manage QR labels from the dashboard
Demo butiğimizde 5 kıyafet hazır bekliyo: Our demo boutique has 5 outfits ready and waiting. Scan the QR with your phone, upload your photo, and see the result. 30 seconds.
Etiketi okut, saniyeler içinde üstünde g: Scan the tag, see it on you in seconds
Etiketteki QR’ı okutur, fotoğrafını çeke: Scan the QR on the tag, snap a photo — the outfit instantly appears on you.
Evet. Ürünü Mirrorly'ye yükle, üretilen: Yes. Upload the product to Mirrorly, add the generated QR to the corner of your Trendyol image, or drop it as a link in the product description. When customers scan it, they see it on their own body — no need to leave Trendyol, they come right back and buy.
Google ile gir, butik bilgilerini doldur: Sign in with Google, fill in your boutique details, and you're ready in 2 minutes.
Görseldeki QR'ı okut, üstünde gör: Scan the QR on the photo, see it on you
Görsele bir QR ekle, \"üstümde nasıl dur: Add a QR to the photo, and answer "how would this look on me?" right in the cart.
Görsele ya da açıklamaya QR damgası: Stamp a QR on the photo or the description
Her ürüne özel QR otomatik üretilir, A6: A unique QR is generated automatically for every product — print it as an A6 label.
First boutique case studies coming soon.
İlk pilot butiklerimizle çalışıyoruz. İl: We're working with our first pilot boutiques. The first case studies (fitting room traffic, return reduction, sales conversion) will be published here.
Kabin sırası yerine seçici deneme: Selective try-on instead of a fitting room line
Kabin sırasını sıfırla: Cut the fitting room line to zero
Kabinde sıra yok: No line at the fitting room
Karar sepette netleşir: The decision becomes clear in the cart
Kendi bedeninde anında görsel, kabinde s: Instant visual on your own body, no fitting room line
Kendi fotoğrafınla dene: Try it with your own photo
Kendi kaydolursun, ürün görsellerini yük: You sign up yourself, upload your product photos, and a unique QR is generated automatically for every product. Print it from the dashboard, hang it on the garment. No waiting on anyone.
Kendiniz kaydolur, ürünlerinizi yükler;: You sign up yourself and upload your products; a unique QR is generated automatically for each one.
Kıyafetin fotoğrafını çek, sisteme yükle: Photograph the garment, upload it to the system, enter the price and size.
Scan the QR on the garment with your phone.
Kurulum ekibi beklemek yok — anında canl: No waiting on a setup team — live instantly
Mağaza olarak nasıl kayıt olurum?: How do I register as a store?
Mağazada ürünün üstüne, online satıştays: Add it to the product in-store, or to the photo if you sell online — the rest is up to the customer.
Mağazada ya da ekranda gördüğün kıyafeti: Instantly try on any outfit you see in-store or on screen, using your own photo.
Mağazada ya da ekranda, nerede görürsen: In-store or on screen, wherever you see it
Mirrorly'yi bugün kur, ilk QR'ını bu haf: Set up Mirrorly today, stick up your first QR this week.
Müşterilerim deneme yapmak için ne yapac: What do my customers need to do to try it on?
Müşterin vitrini gördü, içeri girmedi. K: Your customer saw the window display and didn't come in. Waited in the fitting room line and walked out. Bought online, it didn't fit, sent it back.
Müşteriniz kabine girmeden, kıyafeti ken: Your customer sees the outfit on themselves, on their phone, without ever stepping into a fitting room.
Okut, fotoğraf çek ya da galeriden yükle: Scan, snap a photo, or upload from your gallery — see it on you
Önce demoyu görmek istiyorum →: I'd like to see the demo first →
Panelden her ürünün QR'ını PDF olarak in: Download every product's QR as a PDF from the dashboard — A6 label size — print it on glossy paper and stick it next to the product tag. You can even print it on the back of your existing price tag.
Panelden istatistik ve kredi yönetimi: Stats and credit management from the dashboard
QR'ı nasıl yazdırırım?: How do I print the QR?
Rafta beğenir, etiketi okutur, kabine gi: Falls for it on the rack, scans the tag, sees it on themselves without setting foot in a fitting room.
Sağ üstteki \"Butiğimi Kur\" butonuna ba: Tap "Set Up My Boutique" in the top right, sign in with your Google account, and fill in your boutique name and contact info. You're in the dashboard in 2 minutes, ready to upload your first product. Sole proprietorship or LLC — doesn't matter.
Sepet terki ve iade sohbeti azalır: Fewer abandoned carts and return conversations
Şu an erken erişim aşamasındayız. İlk bu: We're currently in early access. Special pricing for our first boutiques goes out by email — sign up and we'll reach out to you. Pricing model: a flat monthly fee per boutique, not per product.
Snap a single photo or upload from your gallery.
Telefonun kamerasıyla etiketteki QR'ı ok: They scan the QR on the tag with their phone camera, the page opens, they upload their own photo, and in 5–10 seconds the outfit appears on them. No account needed — their first try-on is instant.
Trendyol, kendi siten, Instagram — fark: Trendyol, your own site, Instagram — it doesn't matter
Trendyol'da satıyorum, benim için işe ya: I sell on Trendyol — will this work for me?
